title: Root of the Matter: Feeling Myself
description: Join us as we have conversations on exploring your identity and what it means to really be yourself. We’ll explore our roots and cultivate community through open dialogue, fun activities, and food. All are welcome!

title: LEAD Series – Your Life, Your Tempo: Time and Energy Management
description: Ready to take control of your rhythm? In this upbeat workshop, you’ll learn how to manage your time and your energy so you can work smarter, not harder. Through interactive activities and real-life strategies, you’ll discover how to set priorities, avoid burnout, and create habits that actually fit your lifestyle. Walk away feeling more balanced, focused, and empowered to lead your life at your own tempo.

title: U-Empower Workshop: The Love Lab
description: A discussion series on healthy relationships, boundaries, communication, and respect.

title: The Career Plug
description: This event highlights the many non-traditional and high-demand pathways available today, including apprenticeships, trades, certifications, and workforce development programs that lead to real, stable, well-paid careers.

title: Ask the Dean
description: Share your experiences as a Cal State LA student, the resources you find most helpful, and how our Dean of Students and the University can best support you. Submit the Ask the Dean form by February 12, 2026, for a chance to win raffle prizes.

title: LEAD Series – Inclusive Leaders, Rise! Being Culturally Responsive
description: Being a leader today means creating spaces where everyone feels seen, valued, and included. In this workshop, students will explore what it means to be culturally responsive and how our identities show up in the work we do. Through interactive activities and real examples, participants will learn practical ways to understand diverse perspectives, avoid cultural assumptions, and uplift the voices of others.

title: Beyond the Mirror (Body Acceptance Week)
description: Join us for a Body Acceptance Week event, Beyond the Mirror: Jessica Wilson on Body Acceptance and Black Joy.
